economic_notes: Nation holds large investment portfolio with CIBC Wood Gundy valued at $30,908,642 (cost $24,704,172) including equities, fixed income, and cash equivalents. Settlement capital fund transfers $1,000,000 per year to general operating revenue. Total investment management fees were $311,344. Smith's Landing Development Corporation is accounted for by modified equity method with no revenues or earnings in 2022.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024 — auditor report dated June 19, 2024 but statements are for FY2022). Nation holds a large settlement capital fund of $30.9M invested with CIBC Wood Gundy, recorded as non-financial asset (investment). $1M per year transferred from settlement fund to operating revenue. Smith's Landing Development Corporation accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $4,270,834 + Akaitcho Territory Government $116,209 + Alberta Government $484,182 + Government of Canada $264,965 + FNDF $358,485 = $5,494,675 (rounded to $5,494,690 using schedule figures). OSR includes investment income $1,000,000 and other revenue $1,429,820 less netting adjustments. Prior year expenses include amortization of $101,352 added to program expenditures of $3,868,367 = $3,969,719. Two contingent liabilities noted from member claims. Deferred revenue is very large at $3.2M relative to operations.
